calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing To Confirm Arbitration Award; Memorandum And Points Of Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER COINBASE, INC.'s Hearing To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER COINBASE, INC. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

Barbara Smith's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
